name: claudecord
shortDescription: Give your agents Discord channels. Talk to your team from your phone.
longDescription: Claudecord bridges Discord and your tmux-orchestrator agent team. Each agent gets a Discord channel. Messages route automatically. Agents reply via a simple script. Ephemeral channels are created on agent spawn and archived on kill. Requires tmux-orchestrator.

skills.name: discord-setup
skills.description: Interactive setup wizard: bot token, guild ID, channel routing
